rationale.ai-review: AI verification manager evaluates milestone execution and issues pass/fail verdicts.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Dashboard enables asynchronous human monitoring and intervention via an issue tracker.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Verification phase demands concrete evidence like CI results and test outputs.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Maintains persistent, auditable SQLite records of all agent actions and decisions.
rationale.remediation-gating: Verification phase gates milestone progression and triggers bounded automated fix cycles.
